name: Collision-Free Configuration Map Generation
description: A robotics engineer is commissioning a new manufacturing cell where a robot arm operates in close proximity to a fixture table and equipment enclosures. Generate a collision configuration map by placing at least 3 obstacle objects (cuboids or cylinders) in the scene and evaluating at least 50 distinct joint configurations. The evaluation must vary at least 3 joints across a range of at least 40 degrees each, recording collisions and end-effector positions. Export the data to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/collision_map.csv (columns: config_id, j0_deg, j1_deg, j2_deg, ee_x, ee_y, ee_z, collision) and a summary to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/collision_report.json (fields: total_configs, collision_count, collision_free_count, collision_rate_pct, obstacles_placed, obstacle_positions). Ensure obstacles are positioned to result in both safe and colliding configurations. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
